title: Ubud Heat Wave
lead: Ubud is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ubud has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is 11.2 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The city's energy consumption is expected to increase significantly due to the high demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
